mapper.insert: insert into appr_line( doc_id, emp_id, lin_order, lin_status ) values( #{docId}, #{empId}, #{linOrder}, #{linStatus} )
mapper.update: update appr_line set lin_status = #{linStatus}, lin_approved = sysdate where doc_id = #{docId} and emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: select lin_id, doc_id, emp_id, lin_order, lin_status from appr_line where doc_id = #{docId} and lin_order = #{linOrder}

select l.lin_id, l.doc_id, l.emp_id, l.lin_order, l.lin_status, to_char(l.lin_approved, 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as lin_approved, e.emp_name, p.pos_name from appr_line l join employee e on e.emp_id = l.emp_id join emp_position p on p.pos_id = e.pos_id where l.doc_id = #{docId} order by l.lin_order
